notes: This registry stores durable metadata for generated open-items rows.
For walkthrough-derived items, current status is read from docs/walkthrough/*.md and enriched here.

items.next_action: Run authenticated end-to-end verification for the remaining marketplace connect flows and update the specific walkthrough area files with the result.
items.blocker: Marketplace credentials, provider access, and live connect-flow verification.

items.next_action: Deploy the EasyPost routing fix, configure EASYPOST_API_KEY in Railway, then run authenticated production EasyPost rates/buy/track verification and update docs/walkthrough/environment.md plus docs/walkthrough/shipping.md.
